notes: Connector depth (#514): Google Drive deep backfill. lib/sync/google-sync.ts:syncDrive previously queried modifiedTime >= sinceIso (1y on first sync, then incremental), so files not modified within the window were never indexed and already-synced accounts never deepened. Live evidence on owner account 2cbc1bab after the #509 merge: drive source = 186 signals, 7 in 14d, newest 06-16, while Gmail/Outlook are live. Fix mirrors the OneDrive intent (#507): enumerate the whole Drive newest-first with NO modifiedTime floor (cap DRIVE_MAX_FILES), skip files already stored by content_hash (gdrive:{id}:{modifiedTime}) so the first run backfills history and later runs stay cheap and self-heal existing accounts, and bound per-run new-file work (DRIVE_MAX_NEW_PER_RUN) so a big backfill spreads across runs. Backend-only, no schema change, no new sign-in surface, no auto-send. Identity seam fully landed first: link-guard (PR #512), Google-sole-sign-in/Microsoft-as-source (PR #513), account consolidation executed (e40b7cd8 -> 2cbc1bab, #509). Predecessors merged: #507 (PR #508), LANDING #500 (PR #501).
